info.title: ClearBank SEPA Direct Debits API
info.description: Enables customers to submit R-message instructions for SEPA Direct Debit payments. Use this API to refuse, return, or refund a SEPA Direct Debit payment by providing the original payment ID and the appropriate ISO 20022 reason code.

post.description: You can call this endpoint to create R-message instructions for a SEPA Direct Debit payment. R-messages are used to refuse, return, or refund SDD payments.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Your API token, obtained from the ClearBank Portal.

parameters.name: DigitalSignature
parameters.description: Signed hash of the body of the request. The hash is signed by your private key.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the request; valid for 24 hours, max length 83.

202.description: Accepted. The R-message instruction has been received and is being processed.

X-Correlation-Id.description: A unique identifier generated by ClearBank to correlate the request with its response.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.
Conflict
example.detail: An R-message instruction for payment 1bfb7a86-7d9b-45ff-9d5c-34048efc4c8a has already been submitted.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

errors.description: A map of field names to arrays of validation error messages.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier of the original SEPA Direct Debit payment to raise the R-message against. This is the ID returned when the payment was created.

reasonCode.description: The ISO 20022 reason code indicating why the SEPA Direct Debit payment is being refused, returned, or refunded. For example, AC06 (AccountBlocked) or MD01 (NoMandate).
